sources: The Lang Cat - State of the Platform Nation 2024/25 (thelangcat.co.uk)
The Lang Cat - State of the Advice Nation 2024/25 and 2025/26 (thelangcat.co.uk)
Defaqto Engage 2025 - full year adviser recommendations data
NextWealth Adviser Tech Stack / Platform Shakeout reports 2024/2025
Investment Trends 2025 UK Adviser Technology & Business Report
Money Marketing / IFA Magazine / Professional Adviser news reporting

data_access_notes.lang_cat_sotpn: Full 'State of the Platform Nation' report is paywalled - available free to subscribers of Lang Cat Analyser 'Everything' plan (~£300+VAT standalone). Only publicly available extracts and press releases captured here.
data_access_notes.lang_cat_sotan: Full 'State of the Advice Nation' report requires registration/subscription.
data_access_notes.fundscape: Quarterly platform press releases are freely available as PDFs. Full Fundscape Platform Report requires subscription.
data_access_notes.platforum: Public blog posts and free extracts available. Full UK Adviser Platforms: Market Overview quarterly report is paywalled.
data_access_notes.nextwealth: Sample PDFs publicly available. Full reports require purchase.
data_access_notes.investment_trends: Report available for purchase. Some statistics released in press.
data_access_notes.fca_data: FCA retail intermediary market data for 2024 is fully open/public via fca.org.uk. Contains firm-level stats but does NOT break down platform usage or platform market share by platform name - focuses on firm count, adviser headcount, revenue, and capital requirements.
data_access_notes.defaqto_engage: Annual rankings press released publicly. Full data behind paywall.

total_advised_platform_aum_end_2024.source: Lang Cat State of the Platform Nation 2024/25 / Q4 2024 Platform Market Scorecard

total_advised_platform_aum_end_2025.note: Platforum figure; Fundscape records adviser platforms specifically reaching ~£784bn by end-2025 within broader platform universe of £1.3trn
total_advised_platform_aum_end_2025.source: Platforum UK Adviser Platforms 2025; Fundscape Q4 2025 Platform Press Release

total_all_platforms_aum_end_2025.note: All platform types (advised, D2C, workplace). Largest single-year gain in Fundscape records (£178bn increase in year).

total_platform_gross_flows_2025.note: All platforms; adviser-specific gross flows £97bn. Surpassed 2021 highs.

advised_platform_gross_flows_Q4_2024.note: Record quarter for advised platforms as at reporting date
advised_platform_gross_flows_Q4_2024.source: Lang Cat Q4 2024 Platform Market Scorecard

number_of_platforms_in_analysis.note: Coverage estimated at ~98% of platform universe (Fundscape)

lang_cat_analyser_most_popular_2025.description: Platforms most frequently viewed/compared on Lang Cat Analyser tool by financial advisers and paraplanners during 2025. Reflects due diligence activity, not AUM.
lang_cat_analyser_most_popular_2025.source: Lang Cat Analyser data, reported in Money Marketing and Professional Paraplanner Jan 2025

rankings.notes: Retained top spot for multiple years running
Moved up from 5th; traded places with Aviva

key_selection_criteria_2025: Onshore bond availability (rose 2 places in ranking; record sales in 2024)
Origo transfer service membership (amid transfer delay concerns)

defaqto_engage_recommendations_full_year.description: Share of adviser platform recommendations by value, processed through Defaqto Engage financial planning tool. ~£57bn of annual recommendations tracked. >30% of UK advisers use Defaqto Engage.
defaqto_engage_recommendations_full_year.source: Defaqto Engage / Money Marketing, Professional Adviser Jan 2026

rankings.notes: Took top spot from Quilter for full-year 2025

defaqto_engage_recommendations_full_year.notes: Substantial gap between top 2 (Aviva 29%, Quilter 28%) and rest of market. Combined top 2 = 57% of recommendations value.

defaqto_engage_recommendations_H1_2025.description: Share of adviser platform recommendations by value, H1 2025 only
defaqto_engage_recommendations_H1_2025.source: Defaqto Engage / IFA Magazine, Professional Adviser mid-2025

rankings.notes: Grew from 24% to 26%; 1 ppt behind Quilter
Dropped from 6th in 2024 to 7th in H1

fe_fundinfo_platform_platinum_ratings_20.description: Annual platform ratings assessing 8 key areas: price competitiveness, reach of proposition, penetration/conversion rate, case size, transaction processing experience, client reporting experience, remote support experience, platform features & due diligence.
fe_fundinfo_platform_platinum_ratings_20.source: FE fundinfo / IFA Magazine, Portfolio Adviser Jan 2026
fe_fundinfo_platform_platinum_ratings_20.notes: Four platforms received Platinum rating for 10 consecutive years (not named in public release)

fundscape_net_flows_ranking_2025_full_ye.description: Net inflows to advised platforms, full year 2025

rankings.notes: Just under half of ALL retail advised platform net flows for year. Captured >1/3 of all net flows in Q4 alone.

fundscape_net_flows_ranking_2025_full_ye.additional_notes: Top 5 adviser platforms accounted for 129% of annual net flows (meaning smaller platforms experienced net outflows). Aggregate net flows of top 3 in Q4 2025 were more than double combined net flows of all other platforms.

lang_cat_q4_2024_scorecard_top_platforms.description: Gross and net sales for advised platforms Q4 2024
lang_cat_q4_2024_scorecard_top_platforms.source: Lang Cat Q4 2024 Platform Market Scorecard
lang_cat_q4_2024_scorecard_top_platforms.notes: Q4 2024 was record new business quarter for advised platforms at £20.92bn gross

top_6_by_aum_gross_flow_share.source: Lang Cat State of the Platform Nation 2024/25 / IFA Magazine
top_6_by_aum_gross_flow_share.notes: Clear correlation between platform size and share of new business. Gap between largest platforms and smaller rivals growing. 'Breaking into the big players club organically is becoming increasingly challenging.'

top_3_dominance_q4_2025.note: Aggregate net flows of these three in Q4 2025 were more than double the combined net flows of all other platforms. Top 5 platforms accounted for 129% of all annual net flows (meaning smaller platforms net negative).

market_concentration.market_structure_trend: Increasingly polarised. Large platforms consolidating flows. Smaller platforms under pressure. Net outflows rising across the industry despite record gross flows.

Quilter.aum_notes: Overtook abrdn to become largest advised platform by AUA (occurred mid-2023). Largest advised platform by net flows in 2025.
Quilter.notes: Clear standout in net flows. Captured just under half of all retail advised net flows in 2025. WealthSelect MPS now available on Transact. Strong service ratings.

Aviva.notes: Took top recommendation spot for full year 2025. Narrowing gap with Quilter. Strong net flows.

Transact.notes: Most popular on Lang Cat Analyser (due diligence/comparison activity) but lower recommendation share by value vs Quilter/Aviva. Strong net flows, consistently top 3. Premium/high-quality perception among advisers.

AJ_Bell_Investcentre.notes: Strong AUM growth. Rose to 3rd on Analyser. Overtook Transact in H1 2025 Defaqto recommendations.

Fidelity_Adviser_Solutions.notes: Third by recommendations value. One of the top 6 by AUM.

abrdn_Aberdeen_Wrap.aum_note: Total abrdn AuMA (not just advised platform). Net outflows improving.
abrdn_Aberdeen_Wrap.notes: Was largest advised platform by AUM until overtaken by Quilter. One of top 6 by AUM. Experiencing net outflows.

Scottish_Widows_Platform.notes: Biggest mover on Lang Cat Analyser - jumped from 19th to 8th in 2025. Strong entry into top 10 across multiple rankings.

Nucleus.notes: Fastest riser in FE fundinfo 2026 ratings - jumped 8 places. Climbed in multiple rankings. Popular among smaller/independent firms.

Aegon_Retirement_Choices.notes: Dropped from 6th in 2024 Defaqto to 7th in H1 2025, 9th FY 2025. Declining in adviser preference rankings.

Elevate_Standard_Life.notes: Tied with AJ Bell at 6% of recommendations. Part of Phoenix Group (Standard Life brand). Not in Lang Cat Analyser top 10 for 2025.

Parmenion.notes: Specialist platform known for integrated risk-profiled MPS/DFM proposition. Recommended by more UK advisers than any other wrap platform (Investment Trends 2025). Top service rating in Platforum survey of 1,900+ advisers. Popular with smaller/independent advice firms that want integrated investment solution. Platform Switch Service launched to facilitate bulk transfers.
Parmenion.target_market_profile: Independent/smaller advice firms seeking integrated risk-profiled investment solutions. All-in-one platform + investment proposition model. Not in Defaqto top 10 by recommendations value - suggests high usage among smaller firms making lower-value but numerous recommendations.

Fundment.notes: Rose from 5th to 4th on Lang Cat Analyser. Topped Defaqto 2026 Platform Service Ratings in adviser survey. Newer platform gaining traction.

True_Potential.notes: Primarily tied to own restricted adviser network. Lower presence in independent adviser market.

Hubwise.notes: B2B technology platform / custodian often used as white-label infrastructure. In FE fundinfo top 10.

Zurich.notes: Not prominent in 2025 public rankings. No data found in top 10 of any major ranking.

James_Hay.notes: SIPP specialist. Now part of Nucleus Financial Group following merger. Merged entity competing with broader platform propositions.

Novia.notes: Not in top 10 rankings found. White-label/B2B focus.

7IM.notes: Investment manager/platform hybrid. Not prominent in public 2025 adviser platform rankings.

Praemium.notes: Not in top 10 rankings found in public data. International/portfolio management focus.

Wealthtime.notes: Smaller/newer platform. Not in top 10 rankings in public data.

Hargreaves_Lansdown_Adviser.notes: HL's advised platform proposition. Not prominent in 2025 adviser platform rankings found. HL primarily known as D2C/direct platform.

number_of_platforms_per_adviser.note: Average number of platforms recalled by advisers when prompted in 2025. Up from 5.3 in 2024.
number_of_platforms_per_adviser.source: Investment Trends 2025 UK Adviser Technology & Business Report

platform_consolidation_trend.note: Nearly two-thirds of advisers now use just two or fewer platforms, up from 55% in 2018. Trend toward fewer, deeper platform relationships.

typical_firm_platform_range.note: Typical advice firm uses between 5 and 10 different platforms in the market (though consolidating). Most firms run more than one platform relationship.

large_firms_50plus_advisers.notes: Large firms (50+ advisers) approach platform selection differently and more strategically. Growing share of sector - now >50% of all advisers work in these firms vs 44% eight years ago. More likely to consolidate to preferred panel of 1-3 platforms and negotiate commercial terms. More likely to have own in-house/white-label platform (24% of firms with £250m+ AUA have own platform).

small_sme_firms.notes: Even smaller advice firms are limiting platform range. Consolidation to fewer platforms for efficiency and risk management. More reliant on third-party platforms. Parmenion model (integrated platform + investment solution) particularly appeals to smaller independents who want to outsource investment management.

consolidator_networks.notes: Consolidators (e.g. Perspective, with 13 acquisitions Jul 2024-Jul 2025) typically standardise onto preferred platforms post-acquisition, driving further concentration of flows to top platforms.

fca_retail_intermediary_market_data_2024.data_basis: Retail Mediation Activities Return (RMAR) submitted by firms for periods ending within 2024
fca_retail_intermediary_market_data_2024.platform_usage_data: NOT AVAILABLE in FCA RMAR data. FCA retail intermediary data covers firm counts, adviser headcount, revenue, and capital requirements. It does NOT provide platform-by-platform usage statistics, market share by platform, or breakdown of which platforms are used by which firm types.

investment_trends_2025.source: Investment Trends 2025 UK Adviser Technology & Business Report (16th edition)
investment_trends_2025.methodology: In-depth study of 883 financial advisers, Jan-Feb 2025
investment_trends_2025.parmenion_most_recommended_wrap: Recommended by more UK advisers than any other wrap platform

gated_paywalled_reports.access: Free to Lang Cat Analyser 'Everything' subscribers; ~£300+VAT standalone
gated_paywalled_reports.priority: HIGH - most comprehensive public platform data

gated_paywalled_reports.report: Lang Cat State of the Advice Nation 2025/26
gated_paywalled_reports.content: Annual adviser survey (1,600 adviser panel) covering firm characteristics, platform usage, business concerns, M&A intentions

gated_paywalled_reports.report: Platforum UK Adviser Platforms: Market Overview (quarterly)
gated_paywalled_reports.content: Quarterly platform data, User Leaderboard, individual platform profiles, adviser usage patterns by firm size
Full platform AUM table with all 18 platforms, net/gross flows per platform, market share %
gated_paywalled_reports.access: Press releases free (summary only); full reports subscription
gated_paywalled_reports.priority: MEDIUM - press releases provide enough for top platforms

gated_paywalled_reports.content: Platform usage by firm size, in-house vs outsourced platform trends, adviser behaviour by AUA band
gated_paywalled_reports.access: Paid / some free extracts via sponsors (Embark)

Business benchmarks by firm size, revenue, platform relationships
